parameters-en.Rate: Controls the speed of the chorus’ low-frequency oscillator (LFO) from slow to fast.
parameters-en.Depth: Controls the amplitude of the modulation, from mild to deep.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the chorus effect and the dry signal. At 0%, no chorus is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
parameters-en.Headroom: Some mod pedals' internal signal paths exhibit a bit of grit, especially when placed after a high-gain amp block. Negative values increase the perceived amount of grit; positive values clean things up a bit. At 0dB, the model behaves like the original pedal.
parameters-en.Type: Liquifier is actually two choruses in one, hence the "Dual" default. If you'd prefer it to behave more like a traditional chorus pedal, choose "Single"
parameters-en.Spread: Controls the apparent stereo width of the chorus between the left and right channels.
